actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mage makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) Force damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description: The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14): At Will: Detect Magic, Light, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation; 2/Day Each: Fireball (level 4 version), Invisibility; 1/Day Each: Cone of Cold, Fly

bonus_actions.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
bonus_actions.description: The mage casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

reactions.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
reactions.description: The mage casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

tactical_info.environment: Wizard schools, magical academies, urban centers, adventuring parties
tactical_info.tactics: Uses arcane burst for consistent damage, protective magic for defense, misty step for positioning, variety of spells for different situations
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low physical stats and hit points, dependent on spell resources, vulnerable when spells are exhausted
